title: Minecraft Bedrock Cubemap Settings 1.21.130
description: Cubemap (skybox) settings for Vibrant Visuals. Configures lighting parameters for custom cubemaps including ambient, sky, directional light contributions, and scattering behavior.

format_version.description: The 3-part schema version for parsing these cubemap settings.

minecraft:cubemap_settings.description: The root object containing cubemap lighting customization settings.

description.description: Metadata that identifies these cubemap settings.

identifier.description: The identifier for these cubemap settings. The identifier must include a namespace.

ambient_light_illuminance.description: The amount of fixed ambient light applied to the cubemap. Can be a plain number or a time-keyed collection. Range [0.0, 100000.0] lux. Defaults to 5.625.

sky_light_contribution.description: Controls how much the sky light affects the cubemap. Range [0.0, 1.0]. Defaults to 1.0.

directional_light_contribution.description: Controls how much the directional light (sun and moon) affects the cubemap. Range [0.0, 1.0]. Defaults to 0.0.

affected_by_atmospheric_scattering.description: Determines if the cubemap is affected by atmospheric scattering. Defaults to false.

affected_by_volumetric_scattering.description: Determines if the cubemap is affected by volumetric scattering (fog and light shafts). Defaults to true.

keyframe_number.description: A time-keyed numeric value collection where each key is a normalized time of day from 0.0 to 1.0.
